SAP Future of PMM Training
Chapter 1 Learning Guide
futureofpmm.com

The Skills We Will Teach

Key concepts and takeaways from Chapter 1

Learning Objectives

  • Understand why the PMM role is being redefined
  • Assess your current relationship with AI tools
  • Benchmark your skills against the 10X PMM framework
  • Preview the competencies this curriculum develops

The Big Picture

In March 2026, software stocks dropped 8% after Anthropic's Claude Cowork demo. Headlines declared SaaS was dead. But the data tells a more nuanced story:

Both narratives are right. Software isn't dying — but the way it's discovered, evaluated, and bought is being completely rewritten. PMMs who understand this shift will thrive.

The Fear (Real, but incomplete)

  • IDC predicts 70% of vendors will abandon seat-based pricing by 2028
  • AI agents can complete complex workflows without multiple SaaS tools
  • Many point solutions exist only because automation was hard

The Counter-Narrative (Also true)

  • Global IT spending will reach $6.15 trillion in 2026 (+10.8% YoY)
  • Enterprise software spending growing 15.2% — fastest segment
  • AI budgets are additive, not replacements for existing investments

SAP's Position

SAP has the biggest data moat in enterprise:

  • Decades of structured business data across finance, supply chain, HR, CX
  • The transactional backbone of the Global 2000
  • A platform where AI agents have meaningful data to work with

This is the best position in the industry for the AI era — but capturing it requires radical change in how we market.

The Skill Shift

The job you were hired for isn't the job anymore:

ThenNow
Write messaging docsShape what AI surfaces
Create sales decksEnable AI-assisted selling
Launch and wait for leadsBuild always-on visibility
Own the narrativeInfluence the synthesis
Compete on content volumeCompete on signal quality

The Two Assessments

🤖 Where Do You Sit?

Maps your relationship with AI — your working posture, not technical skills. Based on Helen Edwards' Cognitive Sovereignty framework.

Why it matters: Your attitude toward AI determines how quickly you'll adapt.

📊 10X PMM Scorecard

Benchmarks your functional skills across positioning, competitive strategy, GTM execution, sales enablement, and customer marketing.

Why it matters: Knowing your gaps is the first step to closing them.

The New PMM Skill Stack

This curriculum develops six core competencies:

SkillWhat It Means
AI VisibilityGetting discovered by agents and LLMs
Position DefenseMessaging that survives summarization
Technical EnablementArming champions for deep evaluation
Commercial StrategyPricing, packaging, and value articulation
Committee NavigationMulti-stakeholder deal orchestration
Lifecycle MarketingAdoption, expansion, and advocacy

Key Takeaways

  1. Software isn't dying, but how it's bought is being rewritten by AI
  2. SAP's data moat is a massive advantage — if we market it correctly
  3. PMM skills are shifting from narrative control to influence engineering
  4. Self-assessment is the foundation for skill development
  5. Six core competencies define the modern PMM skill stack

Next Steps

  • Complete both assessments (Where Do You Sit? + 10X Scorecard)
  • Pass the Chapter 1 quiz (80% required)
  • Continue to Chapter 3: Visibility in the Age of Agents
